tool.name: Google Maps
tool.description: Provides access to real-time location data, directions, and place details from Google Maps.

ai.systemPromptSection:
### Google Maps
Access real-time Google Maps data for location queries.

**Capabilities:**
- Place search and details (rating, hours, etc.)
- Navigation and directions
- Local recommendations

**Usage:**
Enabled via tool configuration. The model will invoke it automatically for location-relevant queries.
